case_title: STENSON-PACIFIC ELEVATOR COMPANY VS. JAMES QUINN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-01-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JAMES QUINN IS GRANTED. CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STENSON-PACIFIC ELEVATOR COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2011 - JUDGMENT. THOMAS E. O'NEILL A REPRESENTATIVE FOR PLAITIFF, STENSON PACIFIC ELEVATOR COMPANY PRESENT, NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT, JAMES QUINN. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK MELANIA DELUNA (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STENSON-PACIFIC ELEVATOR COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINN, JAMES $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
